post.content:
Chaweng is beautiful. But in peak season? 🫠

Silver Beach is Koh Samui's best-kept secret.
Crystal water, almost no crowds, easy parking, great for snorkeling. 🤿

Ask Coco for more hidden spots on the island 🥥
Link in bio.
